blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,435 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
